examples: According to the Nuzi texts, if a wife is barren, she is to provide a maidservant as a substitute to bear her husband's children.
Do the same for your maidservant.
The butler, knowing that Husna served the old Begum Harouni in an indefinite capacity, somewhere between maidservant and companion, did not seat her in the living room.
Wearing clothes only slightly better than those of a maidservant, she saw from a distance the young men at the weddings to which she accompanied Begum Harouni.
